title: Omni-Archive
description: The content is based on Ben 10 Omniverse,The Cartoon Network Series.
body: DESCIPTION•This datapack provides access to plumber supplies.•The content is based on Ben 10 Omniverse,The Cartoon Network Series.•This is not original content; it's a fan-made product.•Copyrights belongs to Logical Decepticon.GUIDE•The plumber badge recipe will unlock when you join the game.•There is no recipe for the Omnitrix yet.•To obtain the Omnitrix, reach experience level 40 and use the Plumber badge.•To obtain the Proto-Tool, reach experience level 20 and use the Plumber badge.OMNITRIX•Switch the playlist via slot 9.•Right Click the omnitrix while crouching and transform into an alien in slot 9.•There is a limited battery life when in alien form.•While you are an alien, you can turn back into a human by crouching and rRight Click in the first slot.•When your health bar is low, Omnitrix activates FailSafe to protect you.•There are currently 20 aliens.PROTO-TOOL•Right-click while crouching to switch modes.•If you hold it in your left hand, the Proto-Tool will hang over your shoulder.•Use slot 9 to change modes while Proto-Tool is on your shoulder..•There are currently 11 mods.CHILI-FRIES•One of the heroes's favorite foods.Mr.Smoothy•One of the heroes's favorite drinks.•There are currently 3 aroma.PLUMBER-BADGE•You can use it by holding it in your main hand.•To change the function mode, right-click while crouching.•Location mode detects other players wearing the plumber badge.•Information mode provides information about existing aliens.•Omnitrix Access mode is unlocked if you reach experience level 40.•Proto-Tool Access mode is unlocked if you reach experience level 20.TECHADON-ROBOTS•In the world, spawns can be found near players.•There are 10 different types.EON & MİNİONS•In the world, spawns can be found near players.•Armed And Dangerous•Eon's dialogue lines are also included.PROTO-TRUCK•an alternative for transportationNOTES•This is still a trial version, so there may be bugs.•If you encounter any problems, please contact us via Discord and YouTube.•Don't waste hard work by stealing models or code.•To install the package, extract the files from the zip archives.LINKSDiscord-ServerYoutube-Channel
